data.name: Sex Universe [18+]
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Sex Universe [18+], a space clicker game that intertwines sexuality, adventure, and modern technology in an immersive space streaming simulation.

In the distant future, humanity embarks on a journey across the universe, interacting with different civilizations. The Internet and television unite not only the planet but also galaxies.

In this world, the freedom of manners has already gone far ahead. The story focuses on the famous porn streamer Alice (or Alice), who has received an invitation to take part in interplanetary sex games. This is a great chance not only to significantly increase her media exposure but also to earn money.

The essence of the competition is simple: participants have sex under the camera's gaze and under the gaze of the whole world. The winner is the one who gets the most likes and is most liked by the audience. There are no rules in this game, except for safety guarantees for participants.

Climb to the top of popularity, show your sexual energy, and get ready for incredible adventures in Sex Universe!

Features:

  • Simple and engaging clicker gameplay mechanism
  • Interact with fans and perform various sexual acts to earn virtual currency
  • Stunning graphics and animations that bring the world of webcam girls to life
  • Build your reputation and attract a large audience to increase your earnings
  • Explicit content and mature themes, suitable only for players 18 years and older
  • A journey of sexual exploration, virtual stardom, and financial success.

data.short_description: Welcome to Sex Universe [18+], a space clicker game that intertwines sexuality, adventure, and modern technology in an immersive space streaming simulation.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
